title: Comfort Pure Ultimate Fresh & Mild Ultra Concentrated Fabric Conditioner Dermatologist-Recommended Gentle Next to Sensitive Skin 58 washes (870 ml)
features: Our Best Next to Sensitive Skin: Comfort Pure Ultimate Fresh & Mild Ultra Concentrated Fabric Conditioner is dermatologist recommended by the Skin Health Alliance
Snuggly Soft: This fabric softener unlocks incredible softness from just a tiny dose, leaving your clothes feeling gentle against your skin
Gentle Freshness: Our washing conditioner has a gentle, fresh scent that evokes the feeling of snuggling up in a freshly washed fluffy blanket
Suitable for the Entire Family: Gentle next to sensitive skin and perfect for keeping baby clothes incredibly soft
Effective in Short and Cold Cycles: Our laundry softener delivers excellent results in various washing conditions
Sustainability: Our Comfort laundry conditioner bottle contains 100% recycled plastic (excluding cap and sleeve)
description: Product Description Infuse your laundry with a touch of care using Comfort Pure Ultimate Fresh & Mild Ultra Concentrated Fabric Conditioner. This fabric softener is gentle next to sensitive skin and dermatologist recommended by the Skin Health Alliance, making it suitable for the entire family. Comfort Ultimate Fresh & Mild Ultra Concentrated Fabric Conditioner is effective even in short and cold cycles. Its delicate scent evokes the comforting sensation of curling up in a fluffy blanket. Just a tiny dose leaves your clothes feeling snuggly soft and smelling fresh. How to use: For best results, pour straight into the conditioner compartment of your washing machine next to your favourite detergent (we recommend Persil Ultimate Fresh & Mild liquid for a gentle yet effective clean). Recommended dosage: for a 4-5kg wash load use 15ml, 6-7kg wash load use 32ml. Do not pour directly onto fabrics. Wash hands after use. You do not need to dilute. Select your wash setting, then let your machine take care of the rest. Our Comfort bottle contains 100% recycled plastic (excluding cap and sleeve); please recycle both the bottle and the cap. Use Comfort Pure Ultimate Fresh & Mild in every wash to help fabric fibres stay smooth, leave a long-lasting delicate fragrance on your clothes and make your laundry much easier to iron. Ingredients 5-15%: Cationic surfactants. <5%: Perfume, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate Directions Dose straight into your washing machine drawer next to your favourite detergent. Do not pour directly onto fabrics and do not dilute. Select your wash setting.
